identity.professionalTitle: System Administrator | IT Infrastructure & Cloud (AWS) | Networking | DevOps | AI Infrastructure

summary: System Administrator with 3+ years of experience managing enterprise IT infrastructure, Windows Server, Active Directory, Microsoft Intune, and production systems. Skilled in AWS (EC2, S3, IAM, VPC, CloudWatch), Linux/Ubuntu administration, shell scripting, networking (DNS/DHCP/VLAN/Firewall/VPN), NAS configuration, endpoint security, and backup & disaster recovery. Experienced in AI/LLM model deployment, AI infrastructure setup, system & server building, and DevOps tooling (Docker, CI/CD, GitHub Actions). Proven track record of optimizing uptime, reducing incidents, and delivering scalable IT solutions.
currentFocus: AI-native reliability automation — self-healing cloud platforms with real-time incident detection and AI-assisted RCA
Blockchain-verified document intelligence — on-chain SHA-256 fingerprint verification for compliance workflows
Infrastructure as discipline — NAS, backup & disaster recovery, patch management, system hardening, endpoint security
